message.content:
@startuml
'!option handwritten true

actor SuperUser as SU
rectangle Browser as B
rectangle Server as S
cylinder Database as DB

SU -> B: navigate to profile
B -> S: loadAllUsers()
S -> DB: fetch
DB --> S: return
S --> B: return
B -> B: display

SU -> B: enable/disable user
B -> S: changeStatus(user)
S -> DB: save
DB --> S: return
S --> B: return
B -> B: display

@enduml
